untranslatable_reason: Cross-sectional ranking and portfolio construction (long top 50, short bottom 50 by 252-day returns) cannot be expressed using single-stock indicator conditions. This strategy requires: (1) calculation of 252-day returns across entire universe, (2) ranking mechanism across all stocks, (3) portfolio-level selection and weighting logic. The backtest engine rules allow only individual indicator comparisons on a per-stock basis, not cross-sectional ranking or universe-wide aggregation.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_AT_DRY_7 is a portfolio-level, cross-sectional momentum strategy that fundamentally requires ranking all stocks by 252-day returns and selecting extreme deciles. This cannot be decomposed into per-stock entry/exit rules using the allowed single-indicator operators. Implementation requires a custom ranking module outside the scope of these rule definitions.
